---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem to help us improve Soulboard
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: [bug]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Go to "..."
2. Click on "..."
3. Scroll to "..."
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots Or Logs
If applicable, add screenshots, terminal output, or logs to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11, Arch Linux...]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues before opening this one.
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue on the latest main branch.
- [ ] I included enough details to reproduce the issue.
